member.name: T:Splat.ActionDisposable
member.summary: A disposable which will call the specified action.

member.name: M:Splat.ActionDisposable.#ctor(System.Action)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The action to execute when disposed.

member.name: P:Splat.ActionDisposable.Empty
member.summary: Gets an action disposable which does nothing.

member.name: T:Splat.BooleanDisposable
member.summary: Represents a disposable resource that can be checked for disposal status. Based on the System.Reactive.Disposable class.

member.name: M:Splat.BooleanDisposable.#ctor
member.summary: Represents a disposable resource that can be checked for disposal status. Based on the System.Reactive.Disposable class.

member.name: P:Splat.BooleanDisposable.IsDisposed
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the object is disposed.

member.name: M:Splat.BooleanDisposable.Dispose
member.summary: Sets the status to disposed, which can be observed through the property.

member.name: T:Splat.CompositeDisposable
member.summary: Represents a group of disposable resources that are disposed together. This is a simplified version based on System.Reactive's one.

member.name: M:Splat.CompositeDisposable.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with no disposables contained by it initially.

member.name: M:Splat.CompositeDisposable.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified number of disposables.
member.param: The number of disposables that the new CompositeDisposable can initially store.

member.name: M:Splat.CompositeDisposable.#ctor(System.IDisposable[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from a group of disposables.
member.param: Disposables that will be disposed together.
member.exception: Any of the disposables in the collection is null.

member.name: M:Splat.CompositeDisposable.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.IDisposable})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class from a group of disposables.
member.param: Disposables that will be disposed together.
member.exception: Any of the disposables in the collection is null.

member.name: M:Splat.CompositeDisposable.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes all disposables in the group and removes them from the group.

member.name: M:Splat.CompositeDisposable.Init(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.IDisposable})
member.summary: Initialize the inner disposable list and count fields.
member.param: The enumerable sequence of disposables.

member.name: M:Splat.ExceptionMixins.ThrowArgumentNullExceptionIfNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an ArgumentNullException if the value is null.
member.typeparam: The type of the value to check.
member.param: The value to check for null.
The parameter name to include in the exception.

member.name: M:Splat.ExceptionMixins.ThrowArgumentNullExceptionIfNull``1(``0,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an ArgumentNullException if the value is null.
member.typeparam: The type of the value to check.
member.param: The value to check for null.
The parameter name to include in the exception.
The message to include in the exception.

member.name: T:Splat.Builder.IAppBuilder
member.summary: Application builder interface for configuring dependency injection and services.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.IAppBuilder.Build
member.summary: Builds this instance.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.IAppBuilder.UseCurrentSplatLocator
member.summary: Uses the current splat locator.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.IAppBuilder.UsingModule``1(``0)
member.summary: Uses the module.
member.typeparam: The Splat Module Type.
member.param: The registration module.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.IAppBuilder.WithCoreServices
member.summary: Configures the core services.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.IAppBuilder.WithCustomRegistration(System.Action{Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver})
member.summary: Configures with custom registration.
member.param: The configure action.

member.name: T:Splat.Builder.IAppInstance
member.summary: Application instance interface providing access to dependency injection services.

member.name: P:Splat.Builder.IAppInstance.Current
member.summary: Gets the current services.

member.name: P:Splat.Builder.IAppInstance.CurrentMutable
member.summary: Gets the mutable service registrar.

member.name: T:Splat.Builder.IModule
member.summary: Defines a contract for ReactiveUI modules that can configure dependency injection. This provides an AOT-compatible way to register services.

member.name: M:Splat.Builder.IModule.Configure(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver)
member.summary: Configures the dependency resolver with the module's services.
member.param: The dependency resolver to configure.

member.name: T:Splat.AppLocator
member.summary: A Locator which will host the container for dependency injection based operations.

member.name: P:Splat.AppLocator.Current
member.summary: Gets the read only dependency resolver. This class is used throughout libraries for many internal operations as well as for general use by applications. If this isn't assigned on startup, a default, highly capable implementation will be used, and it is advised for most people to simply use the default implementation.

member.name: P:Splat.AppLocator.CurrentMutable
member.summary: Gets the mutable dependency resolver. The default resolver is also a mutable resolver, so this will be non-null. Use this to register new types on startup if you are using the default resolver.

member.name: P:Splat.AppLocator.InternalLocator
member.summary: Gets or sets the current locator instance. Used mostly for testing purposes.

member.name: M:Splat.AppLocator.SetLocator(Splat.IDependencyResolver)
member.summary: Allows setting the dependency resolver.
member.param: The dependency resolver to set.

member.name: M:Splat.AppLocator.GetLocator
member.summary: Gets the full locator. Note you should use or in most situations.

member.name: M:Splat.AppLocator.RegisterResolverCallbackChanged(System.Action)
member.summary: This method allows libraries to register themselves to be set up whenever the dependency resolver changes. Applications should avoid this method, it is usually used for libraries that depend on service location.
member.param: A callback that is invoked when the resolver is changed. This callback is also invoked immediately, to configure the current resolver.
member.returns: When disposed, removes the callback. You probably can ignore this.

member.name: M:Splat.AppLocator.SuppressResolverCallbackChangedNotifications
member.summary: This method will prevent resolver changed notifications from happening until the returned is disposed.
member.returns: A disposable which when disposed will indicate the change notification is no longer needed.

member.name: M:Splat.AppLocator.AreResolverCallbackChangedNotificationsEnabled
member.summary: Indicates if the we are notifying external classes of updates to the resolver being changed.
member.returns: A value indicating whether the notifications are happening.

member.name: T:Splat.DependencyResolverMixins
member.summary: A set of extension methods that assist with the and interfaces.

member.name: M:Splat.DependencyResolverMixins.GetService``1(Splat.IReadonlyDependencyResolver,System.String)
member.summary: Gets an instance of the given . Must return null if the service is not available (must not throw).
member.typeparam: The type for the object we want to retrieve.
member.param: The resolver we are getting the service from.
An optional value which will retrieve only a object registered with the same contract.
member.returns: The requested object, if found; null otherwise.

member.name: M:Splat.DependencyResolverMixins.GetServices``1(Splat.IReadonlyDependencyResolver,System.String)
member.summary: Gets all instances of the given . Must return an empty collection if the service is not available (must not return null or throw).
member.typeparam: The type for the object we want to retrieve.
member.param: The resolver we are getting the service from.
An optional value which will retrieve only a object registered with the same contract.
member.returns: A sequence of instances of the requested . The sequence should be empty (not null) if no objects of the given type are available.

member.name: M:Splat.DependencyResolverMixins.ServiceRegistrationCallback(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.Type,System.Action{System.IDisposable})
member.summary: Registers a new callback that occurs when a new service with the specified type is registered.
member.param: The resolver we want to register the callback with.
The service type we are wanting to observe.
The callback which should be called.
member.returns: A disposable which will stop notifications to the callback.

member.name: M:Splat.DependencyResolverMixins.WithResolver(Splat.IDependencyResolver,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Override the default Dependency Resolver until the object returned is disposed.
member.param: The test resolver to use.
If we should suppress the resolver callback notify.
member.returns: A disposable which will reset the resolver back to the original.

member.name: M:Splat.DependencyResolverMixins.Register``1(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.Func{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Registers a factory for the given .
member.typeparam: The service type to register for.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
A factory method for generating a object of the specified type.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only generate the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.DependencyResolverMixins.Register``2(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a factory for the given .
member.typeparam: The type to register as.
The service type to register for.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only generate the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.DependencyResolverMixins.RegisterConstant(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.Object,System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a constant value which will always return the specified object instance.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
The specified instance to always return.
The type of service to register.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only return the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.DependencyResolverMixins.RegisterConstant``1(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,``0,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a constant value which will always return the specified object instance.
member.typeparam: The service type to register for.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
The specified instance to always return.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only return the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.DependencyResolverMixins.RegisterLazySingleton(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.Func{System.Object},System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a lazy singleton value which will always return the specified object instance once created. The value is only generated once someone requests the service from the resolver.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
A factory method for generating a object of the specified type.
The type of service to register.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only return the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.DependencyResolverMixins.RegisterLazySingleton``1(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.Func{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Registers a lazy singleton value which will always return the specified object instance once created. The value is only generated once someone requests the service from the resolver.
member.typeparam: The service type to register for.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
A factory method for generating a object of the specified type.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only return the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.DependencyResolverMixins.UnregisterCurrent``1(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.String)
member.summary: Unregisters the current the value for the specified type and the optional contract.
member.typeparam: The type of item to unregister.
member.param: The resolver to unregister the service with.
A optional contract which indicates to only removed the item registered with this contract.

member.name: M:Splat.DependencyResolverMixins.UnregisterAll``1(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.String)
member.summary: Unregisters the all the values for the specified type and the optional contract.
member.typeparam: The type of items to unregister.
member.param: The resolver to unregister the services with.
A optional contract which indicates to only removed those items registered with this contract.

member.name: T:Splat.IDependencyResolver
member.summary: Represents a dependency resolver, a service to look up global class instances or types.

member.name: T:Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver
member.summary: Represents a dependency resolver where types can be registered after setup.

member.name: M:Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver.HasRegistration(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Check to see if a resolver has a registration for a type.
member.param: The type to check for registration.
member.returns: Whether there is a registration for the type.
member.param: An optional contract value which will indicates to only generate the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver.Register(System.Func{System.Object},System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Register a function with the resolver which will generate an object for the specified service type. Optionally a contract can be registered which will indicate that registration will only work with that contract. Most implementations will use a stack based approach to allow for multiple items to be registered.
member.param: The factory function which generates our object.
The type which is used for the registration.
An optional contract value which will indicates to only generate the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver.UnregisterCurrent(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Unregisters the current item based on the specified type and contract.
member.param: The service type to unregister.
The optional contract value, which will only remove the value associated with the contract.

member.name: M:Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver.UnregisterAll(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Unregisters all the values associated with the specified type and contract.
member.param: The service type to unregister.
The optional contract value, which will only remove the value associated with the contract.

member.name: M:Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver.ServiceRegistrationCallback(System.Type,System.String,System.Action{System.IDisposable})

summary.para: Register a callback to be called when a new service matching the type and contract is registered.
When registered, the callback is also called for each currently matching service.

member.param: The type which is used for the registration.
An optional contract value which will indicates to only generate the value if this contract is specified.
The callback which will be called when the specified service type and contract are registered.

member.name: P:Splat.InternalLocator.Current
member.summary: Gets the read only dependency resolver. This class is used throughout libraries for many internal operations as well as for general use by applications. If this isn't assigned on startup, a default, highly capable implementation will be used, and it is advised for most people to simply use the default implementation.

member.name: P:Splat.InternalLocator.CurrentMutable
member.summary: Gets the mutable dependency resolver. The default resolver is also a mutable resolver, so this will be non-null. Use this to register new types on startup if you are using the default resolver.

member.name: M:Splat.InternalLocator.Dispose
member.summary: Releases unmanaged and - optionally - managed resources.

member.name: M:Splat.InternalLocator.SetLocator(Splat.IDependencyResolver)
member.summary: Allows setting the dependency resolver.
member.param: The dependency resolver to set.

member.name: M:Splat.InternalLocator.RegisterResolverCallbackChanged(System.Action)
member.summary: This method allows libraries to register themselves to be set up whenever the dependency resolver changes. Applications should avoid this method, it is usually used for libraries that depend on service location.
member.param: A callback that is invoked when the resolver is changed. This callback is also invoked immediately, to configure the current resolver.
member.returns: When disposed, removes the callback. You probably can ignore this.

member.name: M:Splat.InternalLocator.SuppressResolverCallbackChangedNotifications
member.summary: This method will prevent resolver changed notifications from happening until the returned is disposed.
member.returns: A disposable which when disposed will indicate the change notification is no longer needed.

member.name: M:Splat.InternalLocator.AreResolverCallbackChangedNotificationsEnabled
member.summary: Indicates if the we are notifying external classes of updates to the resolver being changed.
member.returns: A value indicating whether the notifications are happening.

member.name: T:Splat.IReadonlyDependencyResolver
member.summary: An interface for interacting with a dependency resolver in a read-only fashion.

member.name: M:Splat.IReadonlyDependencyResolver.GetService(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Gets an instance of the given . Must return null if the service is not available (must not throw).
member.param: The object type.
An optional value which will retrieve only a object registered with the same contract.
member.returns: The requested object, if found; null otherwise.

member.name: M:Splat.IReadonlyDependencyResolver.GetServices(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Gets all instances of the given . Must return an empty collection if the service is not available (must not return null or throw).
member.param: The object type.
An optional value which will retrieve only objects registered with the same contract.
member.returns: A sequence of instances of the requested . The sequence should be empty (not null) if no objects of the given type are available.

summary.para: This class is a dependency resolver written for modern C# 5.0 times. It implements all registrations via a Factory method. With the power of Closures, you can actually implement most lifetime styles (i.e. construct per call, lazy construct, singleton) using this.
Unless you have a very compelling reason not to, this is the only class you need in order to do dependency resolution, don't bother with using a full IoC container.
This container is not thread safe.

member.name: M:Splat.ModernDependencyResolver.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Splat.ModernDependencyResolver.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Func{System.Object}}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A registry of services.

member.name: M:Splat.ModernDependencyResolver.Duplicate
member.summary: Generates a duplicate of the resolver with all the current registrations. Useful if you want to generate temporary resolver using the method.
member.returns: The newly generated class with the current registrations.

member.name: M:Splat.ModernDependencyResolver.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes of all managed memory from this class.
member.param: If we are currently disposing managed resources.

member.name: T:Splat.NullServiceType
member.summary: Represents a placeholder service type for null service registrations.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The value factory.

member.name: M:Splat.NullServiceType.#ctor(System.Func{System.Object})
member.summary: Represents a placeholder service type for null service registrations.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The value factory.

member.name: P:Splat.NullServiceType.Factory
member.summary: Gets the Factory.

member.name: T:Splat.ResolverMixins
member.summary: Resolver Mixins.

member.name: M:Splat.ResolverMixins.RegisterAnd``1(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a factory for the given .
member.typeparam: The service type to register for.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only generate the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.ResolverMixins.RegisterAnd``1(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.Func{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Registers a factory for the given .
member.typeparam: The service type to register for.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
A factory method for generating a object of the specified type.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only generate the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.ResolverMixins.RegisterAnd``2(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a factory for the given .
member.typeparam: The type to register as.
The service type to register for.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only generate the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.ResolverMixins.RegisterAnd``2(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.Func{``1},System.String)
member.summary: Registers a factory for the given .
member.typeparam: The type to register as.
The service type to register for.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
A factory method for generating a object of the specified type.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only generate the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.ResolverMixins.RegisterConstantAnd(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.Object,System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a constant value which will always return the specified object instance.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
The specified instance to always return.
The type of service to register.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only return the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.ResolverMixins.RegisterConstantAnd``1(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a constant value which will always return the specified object instance.
member.typeparam: The service type to register for.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only return the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.ResolverMixins.RegisterConstantAnd``1(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,``0,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a constant value which will always return the specified object instance.
member.typeparam: The service type to register for.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
The specified instance to always return.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only return the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.ResolverMixins.RegisterLazySingletonAnd(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.Func{System.Object},System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a lazy singleton value which will always return the specified object instance once created. The value is only generated once someone requests the service from the resolver.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
A factory method for generating a object of the specified type.
The type of service to register.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only return the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.ResolverMixins.RegisterLazySingletonAnd``1(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a lazy singleton value which will always return the specified object instance once created. The value is only generated once someone requests the service from the resolver.
member.typeparam: The service type to register for.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only return the value if this contract is specified.

member.name: M:Splat.ResolverMixins.RegisterLazySingletonAnd``1(Splat.IMutableDependencyResolver,System.Func{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Registers a lazy singleton value which will always return the specified object instance once created. The value is only generated once someone requests the service from the resolver.
member.typeparam: The service type to register for.
member.param: The resolver to register the service type with.
A factory method for generating a object of the specified type.
A optional contract value which will indicates to only return the value if this contract is specified.
